Generate two ethical decision options for this scenario.

DECISION QUESTION: Should Engineer A disclose the structural deficiencies to the local building authority despite the confidentiality directive from Client W?

RELEVANT OBLIGATIONS: Hold paramount the safety of the public, Maintain client confidentiality

Generate exactly 2 options that represent meaningful choices.
Option 1 should typically align with professional duty (mark as board choice).
Option 2 should represent an alternative approach.

FORMATTING (ProEthica style): Do not use em dashes or en dashes in output text. Do not dodge that by substituting stacked parentheticals or excessive colons or semicolons. Write plain sentences: use commas, or split into two sentences.

Output format:
OPTION1_LABEL: [action-oriented label, 5-10 words]
OPTION1_DESC: [1 sentence description]
OPTION2_LABEL: [action-oriented label, 5-10 words]
OPTION2_DESC: [1 sentence description]
